title: It's a Big Country: An American Anthology
director: Clarence Brown, Don Hartman, John Sturges
writer: Dore Schary, William Ludwig, Edgar Brooke
actors: Ethel Barrymore, Keefe Brasselle, Gary Cooper
plot: Comprised of eight unrelated episodes of inconsistent quality, this anthology piece of American propaganda features some of MGM Studios' best directors, screenwriters and actors; it is narrated by Louis Calhern.
